Pages.aboutMeta: Learn about IMETS Medical School — our mission, accreditation, and bilingual professional programs across the MENA region.
Pages.helpMeta: Help Center — answers on enrollment, courses, certificates and payments at IMETS Medical School.
Pages.careersMeta: Careers at IMETS Medical School — join the team shaping professional education across the MENA region.
Pages.privacyMeta: How IMETS Medical School collects, uses and protects your personal data.
Pages.termsMeta: The terms and conditions governing use of the IMETS Medical School platform.
Pages.aboutLead: We turn ambition into measurable, certified business skills across the MENA region.
Pages.aboutMissionText: IMETS Medical School delivers professional, bilingual education that bridges the gap between academic theory and real-world performance. From finance to leadership, every program is instructor-led, cohort-based and built around outcomes employers recognize.
Pages.value1Text: Every course maps to a measurable career outcome.
Pages.value2Text: Full English and Arabic delivery with RTL support.
Pages.value4Text: Taught by experienced industry leaders, not just academics.
Pages.careersLead: Help us build the future of professional education.
Pages.helpLead: Answers to the questions we hear most.
Pages.legalIntro: Please read these terms carefully. By using the IMETS Medical School platform you agree to the policies below.
Pages.faq1A: Yes. Every certificate carries a unique code verifiable on our public verification page, and our programs are designed with employer-recognized standards.
Pages.faq2A: Most programs support installment plans in EGP, SAR and USD. You can manage installments and payment methods from your student billing area.
Pages.faq3Q: Is the content available in Arabic?
Pages.faq3A: Yes. The entire platform and most course content is bilingual (English and Arabic) with full right-to-left support.
Pages.faq4A: Courses are instructor-led and cohort-based with live sessions, secure video lessons, quizzes and graded assignments.
Pages.faq5A: Refund requests follow a clear workflow and are handled by our finance team. Contact support for your specific case.
Pages.term1Text: Access to a course is granted upon enrolment and applicable payment. Cohort schedules and access windows are shown on each program page.
Pages.term2Text: Fees may be paid one-off or in installments across supported currencies. Refunds follow the documented finance workflow.
Pages.term3Text: Course materials are for personal learning only and may not be redistributed. Secure video content is DRM-protected and not downloadable.
Pages.term4Text: We process personal data in line with GDPR and Saudi PDPL. You may request access to or export of your data at any time.
Pages.priv1Text: We collect account details, enrolment and payment records, and learning activity (lesson progress, quiz scores). We do not sell your personal data.
Pages.priv2Text: Data is used to deliver courses, issue certificates, process payments, and improve the platform. Marketing communication is opt-in and can be disabled in settings.
Pages.priv3Text: Essential cookies keep you signed in. Non-essential analytics cookies are only set with your consent, which you can withdraw at any time.
Pages.priv4Text: Under GDPR and Saudi PDPL you may access, correct, export, or delete your personal data. Contact support to exercise any of these rights.

Marketing.heroTitle: Become the Healthcare Professional the Future Needs.
Marketing.heroSubtitle: Advance your career through internationally aligned healthcare education designed for doctors, nurses, pharmacists, dentists, healthcare managers, and allied health professionals across the Middle East.
Marketing.trustedBy: Trusted by professionals and academies across the GCC
Marketing.featuredSubtitle: Hand-picked programs from our most in-demand specialties.
Marketing.goalNavSubtitle: Choose a career path — see the outcome, programs available, and explore what fits you.
Marketing.careerPathsSubtitle: Pick the track that matches where you want to grow in healthcare.
Marketing.pathQualityBody: Master quality systems, accreditation readiness, and performance improvement for hospitals and clinics.
Marketing.pathInfectionBody: Build the skills to prevent healthcare-associated infections and lead IPC programs with confidence.
Marketing.pathHospitalBody: Learn operations, governance, and management tools that prepare you for hospital administration roles.
Marketing.pathSafetyBody: Reduce harm, strengthen safety culture, and apply proven methods that improve care quality.
Marketing.pathLeadershipBody: Develop the leadership mindset and skills to guide teams, projects, and healthcare transformation.
Marketing.categoriesSubtitle: Find the right program for your specialty and goals.
Marketing.whySubtitle: The reasons healthcare professionals trust us to advance their careers.
Marketing.whyFacultyCaption: Learn from clinicians and quality leaders who practice in leading hospitals.
Marketing.specialtiesSubtitle: Browse by specialty and find the programs built for your role and career goals.
Marketing.feature3Desc: Attend live or watch the recordings.
Marketing.feature4Desc: Designed to improve your professional opportunities.
Marketing.instructorsSubtitle: Practitioners from leading hospitals — real roles, real experience, real credentials.
Marketing.testimonialsSubtitle: Real voices from roles like yours — ICU, quality, infection control, and more.
Marketing.partnersSubtitle: Our programs are built around the standards and bodies that hospitals and employers recognize — so your certificate carries real professional weight, not just a logo.
Marketing.howItWorksTitle: From first lesson to verified certificate
Marketing.howItWorksSubtitle: A clear, four-step path — the same whichever school you join.
Marketing.step1Desc: Browse by school and specialty. Compare outcomes, schedule, and price before you commit.
Marketing.step2Desc: Reserve your seat and get matched to the next live cohort with a set start date.
Marketing.step3Desc: Attend scheduled sessions with practitioners, complete assessments, track your progress.
Marketing.step4Desc: Receive a verifiable credential with a public code employers can confirm instantly.
Marketing.orgsDesc: IMETS partners with hospitals, clinics, and companies to deliver group certification — bilingual, scheduled around your operations, with manager reporting.
Marketing.orgsFeature1: Dedicated cohorts for your staff, in both schools
Marketing.orgsFeature2: Progress dashboards and completion reporting for managers
Marketing.orgsFeature3: Volume pricing and invoicing for Egypt & the Gulf
Marketing.campusSubtitle: People buy the experience — take a look inside the learning platform.
Marketing.careerCtaSubtitle: Join more than 18,000 healthcare professionals building better careers.
Marketing.ljSubtitle: A clear, supported path from day one to your certificate and beyond.
Marketing.lj1Desc: Reserve your seat in the next cohort in minutes.
Marketing.lj2Desc: Get onboarded and meet your cohort and instructors.
Marketing.lj3Desc: Weekly live sessions on Zoom - with recordings for 12 months.
Marketing.lj4Desc: Apply what you learn on practical, work-like tasks.
Marketing.lj5Desc: Test your knowledge with quizzes and a final assessment.
Marketing.lj7Desc: Join the IMETS alumni community and keep growing.
Marketing.faqHomeSubtitle: Everything you need to know before you enroll.
Marketing.faqDeliveryA: Live online sessions on Zoom, plus recordings you can watch anytime for 12 months.
Marketing.faqAccreditedA: Yes — our programs align with international standards (NAHQ, JCI, DHA, DOH, SCFHS), and certificates are recognized by healthcare employers.
Marketing.faqOutsideA: Yes — everything is online, so you can join from anywhere in the world.
Marketing.faqRecordingsA: Yes — every session is recorded and available to you for 12 months.
Marketing.faqSupportA: Yes — instructors and a dedicated support group follow up with you until you finish.
Marketing.faqDurationA: Most run several weeks with weekly live sessions; the exact duration is shown on each program page.
Marketing.faqCertificateA: Yes — you receive a career-recognized certificate upon successful completion.
Marketing.ctaSubtitle: Join thousands of professionals advancing with IMETS Medical School.
Marketing.footerTagline: Professional, bilingual business education for the MENA region.
Marketing.catalogSubtitle: Explore internationally aligned healthcare education programs designed for professionals across hospitals, clinics and healthcare organizations in the Middle East.
Marketing.featuredSectionSubtitle: Hand-picked programs to start your healthcare career journey.
Marketing.pathsSubtitle: Not sure where to start? Follow a clear path — step by step — from foundation to certification and beyond.
Marketing.pathQualitySubtitle: From foundations to CPHQ, then safety and leadership.
Marketing.pathInfectionSubtitle: Build IPC expertise and prepare for CIC certification.
Marketing.careerQuizSubtitle: Answer 3 quick questions and we’ll recommend the program that fits your next move.
Marketing.careerQuizMeta: Takes under 60 seconds · No account needed
Marketing.careerQuizQ2: What’s your main goal right now?
Marketing.careerQuizA2Safety: Reduce harm and improve patient safety
Marketing.careerQuizA2Lead: Step into a leadership / management role
Marketing.careerQuizA3Beginner: New to quality — need a clear starting path
Marketing.careerQuizA3Clinical: Clinical / IPC role looking to go deeper
Marketing.careerQuizA3Risk: Focused on safety, risk, and compliance
Marketing.careerQuizResultQualityBody: Start with quality foundations, then move toward CPHQ certification.
Marketing.careerQuizResultInfectionBody: Build IPC expertise and progress toward CIC-level mastery.
Marketing.careerQuizResultSafetyBody: Focus on safety systems, risk reduction, and safer care delivery.
Marketing.careerQuizResultLeadershipBody: Develop the management and leadership skills hospitals look for.

Marketing.orgWhySubtitle: Hospitals and healthcare groups partner with IMETS to build stronger, better-trained teams.
Marketing.orgWhyCustomText: Training tailored to your organization's goals, gaps, and specialties.
Marketing.orgWhyAccreditText: Content mapped to JCI, CBAHI, and international healthcare standards.
Marketing.orgWhyMeasureText: Track participation, progress, and outcomes with clear reporting.
Marketing.orgWhyFacultyText: Trainers who actively work in leading hospitals and health systems.
Marketing.orgWhyFlexibleText: On-site, live online, or blended - built around your team's schedule.
Marketing.orgWhyBilingualText: English and Arabic to fit your entire workforce.
Marketing.orgWhyTrust: Trusted by leading hospitals across the region
Marketing.alumniSubtitle: Real professionals, real roles, real career moves after IMETS.
Marketing.philSubtitle: More than watching videos - a path from knowledge to real healthcare impact.
Marketing.philPracticeText: Apply knowledge through real healthcare cases.
Marketing.philTransformText: Create measurable improvements in healthcare organizations.
Marketing.adTitle: A Letter from the Academic Director
Marketing.adQuote: Our promise is simple: every program we build must make you better at your job - not just add a line to your CV. We design each course around the real decisions healthcare professionals face, so what you learn on Monday helps a patient on Tuesday.

About.metaDesc: Building the future of healthcare through practical, internationally aligned education for professionals across the Middle East.
About.heroTitle: Building the Future of Healthcare Through Education.
About.heroSubtitle: At IMETS Medical School, we empower healthcare professionals with practical, internationally aligned education that advances careers, improves patient care, and strengthens healthcare systems across the Middle East.
About.storyTitle: Every Great Healthcare System Begins with Better Education.
About.storyP1: Healthcare is evolving faster than ever. Hospitals need leaders. Patients deserve safer care. And healthcare professionals deserve education that prepares them for real-world challenges - not just exams.
About.storyP2: That is why IMETS Medical School was created.
About.storyMission: to bridge the gap between healthcare education and healthcare practice by delivering professional programs designed by experts, aligned with international standards, and built around the needs of today's healthcare workforce.
About.storyP3: Today, thousands of healthcare professionals across the Middle East trust IMETS to support their professional growth.
About.mission: To empower healthcare professionals through high-quality, practical education that improves careers, enhances patient outcomes, and contributes to stronger healthcare systems.
About.vision: To become the most trusted healthcare education institution in the Middle East and Africa - recognized for academic excellence, innovation, and measurable impact on healthcare professionals and organizations.
About.journeySubtitle: From a bold idea to a trusted healthcare education brand.
About.tl2020: Launched our first professional certification program.
About.tl2030: Becoming a leading healthcare education brand.
About.valuesSubtitle: The principles behind every program we build.
About.valExcellenceText: We pursue the highest standards in education.
About.valIntegrityText: We teach with honesty, transparency, and responsibility.
About.valInnovationText: We continuously improve how healthcare professionals learn.
About.valImpactText: Every program is designed to create measurable career and healthcare outcomes.
About.valLifelongText: Education never ends - we support growth at every stage.
About.valCommunityText: Together we raise the standard of healthcare.
About.whyStandardsText: Programs aligned with global best practices.
About.whyCareerText: Education designed for real career advancement.
About.whyFlexibleText: Live and recorded sessions that fit your schedule.
About.whyPracticalText: Real-world healthcare applications, not just theory.
About.whyCommunityText: Join thousands of learners across MENA.
About.approachSubtitle: How we turn knowledge into real healthcare impact.
About.appPracticeText: Apply knowledge through real healthcare cases.
About.appTransformText: Create measurable improvements in healthcare organizations.
About.leadershipSubtitle: Real leadership behind every program - not only instructors.
About.leadershipNote: Leadership profiles and photos are being added.
About.partnersSubtitle: We work with the institutions that shape healthcare in the region.
About.partAccreditationText: Programs mapped to internationally recognized standards.
About.reachSubtitle: Healthcare professionals trust IMETS across the region and beyond.
About.corporateText: We partner with hospitals and healthcare organizations to build stronger teams through customized professional development programs.
About.futureSubtitle: We are building more than an online school.
About.founderQuote: When we started IMETS, our goal was not simply to offer online courses. We wanted to help healthcare professionals gain the knowledge, confidence, and leadership skills needed to improve patient care and transform healthcare organizations across our region.
About.impactText: Every better-trained healthcare professional has the potential to improve patient outcomes, strengthen healthcare organizations, and raise the standard of care across the region. At IMETS Medical School, that is the impact we strive to create - one learner, one hospital, and one healthcare system at a time.
About.finalTitle: Ready to Join the Future of Healthcare Education?
About.finalText: Whether you are preparing for international certification, pursuing professional development, or leading healthcare transformation, IMETS Medical School is here to support your journey.
